actions.value: Please be very cautious anytime someone is directing you to send them crypto, especially if they make first contact with you. 'Social engineering' is a game that scammers play to fool you into sending money under false pretenses. This kind of attack is best to prevent, and it only requires you to move slowly, so that you may verify what is Truth, before sending any coins to anyone online.
